creator: andrew@tao11.riddles.org.uk
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)

You're suggesting that ports that use Lua should all be changed to use flavors to specify the Lua version (which obviously involves a bunch of changes to Uses/lua.mk and the existing ports)?

Right now what happens is that some ports are using PKGNAMEPREFIX directly, so that for example lua-lpeg installs as lua53-lpeg or lua54-lpeg depending on Lua version. (Many) others just use whatever the default lua version is.
